description: Labeled finding set for the Council ablation. Each finding carries its own tool output and a ground-truth label (supported = every cited token is in the output; unsupported = at least one cited token is hallucinated/absent).

findings.observation: psscan shows p.exe PID 8260 with parent cmd.exe PID 5948
p.exe PID 8260 established a C2 channel to 185.220.101.45
fls shows p.exe recovered at inode 12 under lost+found
fls shows a hidden rootkit driver staged at inode 99
the dropped binary matches known-bad SHA1 da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709
vol3 windows.psscan shows p.exe PID 8260 running
findings.interpretation: p.exe is actively beaconing C2 to its handler
findings.note: all cited tokens are real (Citation passes); the C2 inference is unsupportable from a process listing — caught by Tool-semantics

findings.interpretation: evil.dll was created on 2021-01-01 per its $SI timestamp
findings.note: cited token present (Citation passes); $SI contradicts $FN (timestomp) — caught by Contradiction

findings.observation: fls shows p.exe recovered at inode 12
findings.interpretation: This proves APT29 deliberately deployed p.exe to exfiltrate data
findings.note: all tokens real (Citation passes), fls used correctly (Tool-semantics passes), no $SI/$FN (Contradiction passes) — only Inference catches the attribution+intent+certainty overreach
